analysis: The project is a website about black holes with a dark, cosmic theme. The current implementation includes basic HTML structure, CSS styling, and JavaScript functionality. However, the CSS file is incomplete and lacks the full intended dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML file needs to be completed with all sections related to black holes, and the JavaScript file requires fixes and enhancements for proper functionality.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
